title: ilex dumosa var. dumosa
intro: Ilex dumosa var. dumosa, also known as the Chinese Holly or Chinese Holly Tree, is a species of holly native to southern China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve fever. The health benefits of Ilex dumosa var. dumosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and branches of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may also be used to make extracts and tinctures.
